evidence.quote_or_summary: You can spend time exploring tourist attractions around Rishikesh, Bhimtal, or Kausani.

extracted_items.value: Not encouraged; permitted only for medical conditions at Rs 1,600 for the trek

evidence.quote_or_summary: Having too many mules on a trail isn't good for the ecosystem. This is why, at Indiahikes, we do not encourage offloading. A trekker carries his/her own backpack in the true spirit of trekking. But if — due to a medical condition — you are unable to carry your own backpack, you may offload your backpack. It'll cost you Rs 1,600 for the trek.

extracted_items.value: Able to run, walk, or jog 5 km in 40 minutes (stated in context of age >58)

evidence.quote_or_summary: Apart from this, you should also be able to run, walk or jog jog 5 km in 40 minutes.

extracted_items.value: Treadmill Test (not older than 12 months) required for trekkers above 58 years, to be submitted within a week of registration

evidence.quote_or_summary: If you are above the age of 58 years, you'll need to submit a Treadmill Test (not older than 12 months) within a week of completing your trek registration.

extracted_items.value: Trekkers above 58 years are allowed subject to a Treadmill Test and a 5 km in 40 minutes fitness benchmark

evidence.quote_or_summary: I am more than 58 years old. Can I do this trek? Yes you can! If you are above the age of 58 years, you'll need to submit a Treadmill Test (not older than 12 months) within a week of completing your trek registration. Apart from this, you should also be able to run, walk or jog jog 5 km in 40 minutes.

extracted_items.value: Too many mules on the trail is not good for the ecosystem

evidence.quote_or_summary: Having too many mules on a trail isn't good for the ecosystem.
